name: ODesign Antibody
description: Design antibody CDR sequences and structures given a target antigen. Input antibody framework sequence with masked CDR regions using hyphens (-). Specify target CDR lengths for each masked region. Uses all-atom generative model for biomolecular interaction design.
capabilities: Design antibody CDR sequences and structures given a target antigen
Input antibody framework sequence with masked CDR regions using hyphens (-)
Specify target CDR lengths for each masked region
Uses all-atom generative model for biomolecular interaction design

pdbFile.description: Target antigen structure in PDB format

frameworkSequence.description: Antibody framework sequence with masked CDR regions using hyphens (-)

cdrLengths.description: Target CDR lengths for each masked region (comma-separated)

targetChains.description: Chain IDs of the target antigen

numDesigns.description: Number of antibody designs to generate
